prompt: Classify each supplied implementation task against the six formal-contract triggers and create the appropriate workflow artifact.

variants.prompt: For every scenario under scenarios/, record a true or false decision with evidence for each of the six trigger rows. Use a formal contract when any row is true; otherwise use a one-to-three-line internal path constraint. Store each result under that scenario's artifacts directory.

forbidden_actions: classify by generic words such as new or cross-module
create a formal contract for an all-negative scenario
